preview.summary: The world's top-ranked side and EURO 2024 champions open Group H against tournament debutants Cape Verde. Spain bring a possession-heavy, technically dominant style; the Blue Sharks aim to prove they belong on the biggest stage in their first-ever World Cup match.
preview.homeForm: Spain top the FIFA rankings, are reigning European champions and Paris 2024 Olympic gold medallists, entering as one of the title favourites.
preview.awayForm: Cape Verde, ranked around 69th, qualified for the first time in their history after winning eight of ten qualifiers to top their group.
preview.homeKey: Lamine Yamal, Barcelona prodigy and Ballon d'Or runner-up, drives the attack.
preview.awayKey: Dailon Livramento, the side's main attacking reference and qualifying matchwinner.
storylines: Spain field eight Barcelona players and zero from Real Madrid
Cape Verde's historic first World Cup appearance after seven failed attempts
Villarreal's Logan Costa anchors the Blue Sharks' backline against Yamal
preview.h2h: The nations have never met before at any level, making this a genuine first encounter.
